title: Section 48
content: Save as provided by the last foregoing section and by 1 section 622 of the Code of Civil Procedure (14 of 1882), an order made under this Act shall be final and shall not be liable to be contested by suit or otherwise.
footnote: 1. See now s. 115 of the Code of Civil Procedure, 1908 (Act 5 of 1908).
